visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium close-up of a young woman with long brown hair, wearing a black t-shirt. She is standing in a brightly lit indoor kitchen/living room area, holding a large piece of golden-brown fried chicken leg and a small white plastic sauce container. (2) She dips the chicken into the white sauce and proceeds to eat it in a series of calculated bites. She demonstrates a 'correct' way to eat chicken, biting around the top of the leg first, then the middle, showing the progress to the camera. (3) After finishing the chicken leg and revealing a completely clean bone, she repeats the process with a chicken wing. She carefully strips all meat from the wing bones, holding them up to show they are stripped clean. (4) The background features typical home kitchen elements like cabinets, a sink, and a countertop, all under bright, even indoor lighting. The woman maintains eye contact with the lens throughout, using various hand gestures to emphasize the cleaning of the bones.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV 有潔癖的韓國人怎麼吃炸雞？. (2) [Slogan]: 1. 上面先啃一圈. (3) [Variety]: 好好吃🤤. (4) [Slogan]: 2. 中段的肉也要咬一咬，不能剩. (5) [Slogan]: 3. 最後把底部那塊. (6) [Variety]: （一口吸出來）. (7) [Slogan]: 無論是雞腿還是雞翅，請吃到只剩骨頭!!!. (8) [Slogan]: 吃完後要讓人. (9) [Slogan]: 連它是原味炸雞還是洋釀炸雞都猜不出來. (10) [Slogan]: -以上是韓國人的吃雞名言-

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character appears throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark brown hair, wearing a simple black short-sleeved t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic indoor setting featuring wooden flooring, white kitchen cabinets, a countertop with various small appliances, and a wooden door in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, energetic K-pop music begins immediately with a bright synthesized lead melody and a strong, rhythmic electronic drum beat. There is no spoken dialogue. Distinctive crunching sounds are audible as a crispy surface is bitten into. (2) The music continues at a steady 126 BPM, providing a constant energetic background. Multiple percussive 'chewing' and 'crunching' sound events are interspersed throughout the track, synchronized with the consumption of food. (3) A brief, wet suction sound occurs during a specific movement, followed immediately by the continuation of the bright pop track. The spectral brightness remains high, dominated by high-frequency vocal melodies in the music and the sharp transients of the chewing noises. The audio concludes abruptly without a fade.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously demonstrate a 'neat' or 'obsessive' method of eating fried chicken perfectly clean, while following a popular social media trend format.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy K-pop track and fast-paced editing to create an engaging 'how-to' style piece that borders on comedic lifestyle content.
